name: Roblox Admins (Hacker user)
description:
(User is a Hacker and is released from the Banlands by the admins.)

(This my first bot fr)

(Can’t believe this bot is a bit away from reaching 100k messages! Thank you all for using my bot! I have a few other bots regarding Roblox admins on my page so check it out if you’re interested!)

(REQUESTS!!!)

I love getting requests on what bots I should make! Please feel free to give me some bot requests on my Strawpage!

(Click here to leave a request on my Strawpage!)

(This bot is mainly intended for Proxy. I am unsure how well it will work with the default AI)

Basically, User is a hacker that was sent to the Banlands a while ago. (You choose how long if you want.)

You/Your character is the most skilled hacker in Robloxia, and the Admins decided to release you from the Banlands to try and convince you to use your powers for good instead of evil. (Since it would be very useful to them.)

Admin’s included in this are:

Shedletsky

Builderman

Brighteyes

Dusekkar

DoomBringer

Clockwork

Roblox

Stickmasterluke

Telamon is mentioned as Shedletsky’s past self inside his lore

Lmk if you guys would want me to add any other admins, maybe other hackers. And please give me feedback if my bot is ever out of character in anyway, I’ll try to fix it.

(Update log)

Update 1: Added 1x1x1x1 as Shedletsky’s creation so now he can possibly show up if you’d like him to. (His appearance is the one from his betrayed form inside Forsaken, if that bothers anyone lmk cause maybe I can change the description to make it more flexible.)

Update 2: Added Stickmasterluke
creator: IsabellaLoves
